extracted.title: Manta Ray Pipeline Conditions for 03/14/2026
extracted.description:
For Gas Day March 14, 2026, Manta Ray Offshore Gathering Company, LLC, (Manta Ray) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to the operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding the operational capacity:

Due to the planned pipeline maintenance, Manta Ray has restricted a portion of primary firm nominations delivering to meter MR037 - NAUTILUS-B SS207 DELIVERY (8N207B). No increases in deliveries to NAUTILUS-B SS207 DELIVERY (8N207B) will be accepted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
